501 P2A P2A_BEHAVIOR (P2A) Special Behavior Symptom Evaluation Program CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: intervention programs for mood, behavior, cognitive loss - special behavior symptom evaluation program used in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
